name: gtx-cli
description: CLI tool for AI-powered i18n (wrapper for gt)

scripts.build:clean: sh ../../scripts/clean.sh && pnpm bin:restore && rm -rf binaries && pnpm run build
scripts.build:bin:clean: sh ../../scripts/clean.sh && rm -rf binaries && pnpm run build:bin
scripts.build:bin:release: pnpm run build:bin:clean && pnpm run build:bin
scripts.release: pnpm run release:normal && pnpm run release:bin
scripts.release:bin: pnpm run bin:prep && pnpm run build:bin:clean && pnpm publish --tag bin --no-git-checks && pnpm run bin:restore && pnpm run build:clean
scripts.release:alpha: pnpm run build:clean && pnpm publish --tag alpha
scripts.release:beta: pnpm run build:clean && pnpm publish --tag beta
scripts.release:latest: pnpm run build:clean && pnpm publish --tag latest

author: General Translation, Inc.
